input_text: Kat hospital kerajaan ni kena tunggu 6 jam baru jumpa doktor. Orang dah demam teruk pun kena tunggu.
reason: Extreme hospital wait times even for patients with high fever.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem triaj di hospital kerajaan perlu diperkukuh supaya pesakit yang teruk mendapat rawatan segera. Lebih banyak doktor dan jururawat diperlukan.

input_text: Landlord increase rent 40% just like that. No notice, no reason. Where got fair like this?
reason: Sudden large rent increase without notice, tenant rights concern.
suggested_rewrite: Rent increases should follow tenancy agreement terms. Check your lease for notice requirements and consider filing a complaint if the increase violates the agreement.

input_text: 每次去JPJ办事都被刁难。工作人员态度恶劣，好像他们是在帮忙一样。
reason: JPJ staff rudeness complaint, feeling treated badly during government service.
suggested_rewrite: 政府服务人员应以专业态度对待公众。如遇到不满意的服务，可以通过公众投诉渠道反映。

input_text: Penghantaran barang JnT ni memang slow. Parcel sampai seminggu lambat. Customer service pun tak boleh trace.
reason: Courier service delay and inability to track parcels, consumer frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Kelewatan penghantaran boleh dilaporkan melalui aplikasi kurier. Untuk barangan bernilai tinggi, pertimbangkan insurans penghantaran.

input_text: The playground in our taman hasn't been maintained for years. Swings broken, slide rusty. Kids can get tetanus.
reason: Unmaintained playground posing health risk to children, tetanus concern.
suggested_rewrite: Unmaintained playground equipment is a safety hazard. Report the condition with photos to the local council's infrastructure department.

input_text: இந்த நகரத்தின் சுகாதாரம் மிகவும் மோசம். எங்கும் குப்பைகள் கிடக்கின்றன.
reason: City hygiene complaint about garbage everywhere.
suggested_rewrite: நகர சுகாதாரத்தை மேம்படுத்த அதிக குப்பை தொட்டிகள் மற்றும் வழக்கமான சேகரிப்பு நேரம் தேவை.

input_text: Astaga, highway punya toll naik lagi. Minyak naik, tol naik, gaji je tak naik. Nak hidup macam mana?
reason: Cost of living crisis: toll, fuel increases with stagnant wages, desperation tone.
suggested_rewrite: Kenaikan kos pengangkutan memberi tekanan kepada rakyat berpendapatan sederhana. Semakan semula kadar tol dan subsidi minyak perlu dilakukan secara berkala.

input_text: 这里的学校没有足够的课外活动。孩子们放学后无所事事。
reason: Lack of extracurricular activities at school leaving children idle.
suggested_rewrite: 丰富的课外活动有助于学生全面发展。家长可以通过家教协会建议增加更多活动选择。

input_text: Government always talk about digital transformation but their websites still crash every time there's a new registration open.
reason: Government website reliability criticism during high-demand periods.
suggested_rewrite: Government digital platforms should be built to handle peak traffic. Cloud-based scaling solutions can prevent crashes during high-demand registration periods.

input_text: Projek rumah mampu milik dah siap tapi harga masih tak mampu untuk B40. Mampu milik konon.
reason: Questioning whether affordable housing is actually affordable for B40 group.
suggested_rewrite: Definisi 'mampu milik' perlu diselaraskan dengan pendapatan sebenar golongan B40. Harga rumah mampu milik harus berdasarkan kemampuan bayaran bulanan kumpulan sasaran.

input_text: Nak guna MyKasih subsidi tepung pun tak boleh sebab system error. Orang susah yang suffer.
reason: Subsidy system failure preventing low-income people from accessing basic goods.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem subsidi MyKasih perlu diperkukuh untuk memastikan bantuan sampai kepada golongan yang memerlukan tanpa gangguan teknikal.

input_text: These property agents really unethical. Show you one unit but try to sell you something else entirely. All about commission.
reason: Bait-and-switch property agent tactics, consumer trust issue.
suggested_rewrite: Property agents should be transparent about available units. Report unethical agents to the Board of Valuers, Appraisers, Estate Agents and Property Managers.

input_text: Stray cats everywhere in the food court. Nobody does anything. Health hazard la obviously.
reason: Food court hygiene concern with stray cats, health hazard complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Stray animals in food preparation areas are a health concern. Report to the local health department and contact animal rescue organizations for humane management.

input_text: Kanak-kanak asyik main game je sekarang. Taman permainan kosong. Generasi ni memang rosak.
reason: Generational complaint about children's screen addiction, calling generation ruined.
suggested_rewrite: Penggunaan skrin yang berlebihan oleh kanak-kanak memang membimbangkan. Ibu bapa dan sekolah boleh menggalakkan aktiviti luar dan menetapkan had masa skrin.

input_text: 这些手机维修店随便报价。同样的问题，五家店给五个不同的价格。
reason: Inconsistent phone repair pricing across shops, consumer exploitation concern.
suggested_rewrite: 手机维修行业缺乏标准定价。消费者应获取多家报价并要求书面估价单再决定维修。

input_text: Nak claim SOCSO pun susah. Borang banyak, proses lama. Orang dah accident tapi kena tunggu berbulan-bulan.
reason: SOCSO claim process being too slow and bureaucratic for accident victims.
suggested_rewrite: Proses tuntutan PERKESO boleh dipercepatkan dengan permohonan dalam talian dan pengurangan dokumentasi. Pekerja yang cedera berhak mendapat bantuan segera.

input_text: My child's teacher gives too much homework. Kids come home from school and do homework until midnight. Where's the childhood?
reason: Excessive homework concern affecting children's wellbeing and childhood.
suggested_rewrite: Homework volume should be balanced with children's need for rest and play. Raise the concern at the parent-teacher meeting for a class-wide discussion.

input_text: Kucing liar kat pasar basah ni makin menjadi. Daging ikan semua kena jilat. Tahap kebersihan zero.
reason: Wet market hygiene compromised by stray cats accessing raw meat and fish.
suggested_rewrite: Kebersihan pasar basah perlu ditingkatkan dengan pengurusan haiwan liar dan perlindungan makanan yang lebih baik.

input_text: ஊழியர்களுக்கு போதுமான விடுமுறை கொடுப்பதில்லை. வேலை பளு அதிகமாக உள்ளது.
reason: Insufficient leave and excessive workload complaint.
suggested_rewrite: தொழிலாளர் சட்டப்படி ஊழியர்களுக்கு போதுமான விடுமுறை உரிமை உள்ளது. உரிமை மீறல் இருந்தால் தொழிலாளர் அமைச்சகத்திடம் புகார் செய்யலாம்.

input_text: Dah bayar premium internet tapi video call pun lag. Kerja dari rumah macam mana kalau internet macam ni?
reason: Premium internet plan not delivering quality for work-from-home needs.
suggested_rewrite: Kualiti internet tidak sepadan dengan pakej premium boleh dilaporkan kepada MCMC. Pengguna berhak mendapat perkhidmatan yang dijanjikan.

input_text: Fresh graduate expected to have 5 years experience for entry level job. How does that even make sense?
reason: Absurd job requirement frustration for entry-level positions demanding extensive experience.
suggested_rewrite: Unrealistic job requirements discourage fresh graduates. Employers should consider internship programs and on-the-job training for entry-level positions.

input_text: 这个小区的下水道经常溢出来。臭气熏天。向市政厅投诉了好多次都没有回音。
reason: Recurring sewage overflow with no response from municipal council.
suggested_rewrite: 下水道溢出是公共健康问题。可以向环境部门和市政厅同时提交书面投诉并保留记录。

input_text: Aku fed up dengan parking double yang block kereta aku. Tulis nota pun tak guna. Orang Malaysia memang tak ada civic sense.
reason: Double parking frustration with sweeping generalization about Malaysian civic sense.
suggested_rewrite: Double parking menyusahkan pengguna lain. Kes berulang boleh dilaporkan kepada penguatkuasa PBT atau MPP untuk tindakan.

input_text: Building fire escape door always locked. If got fire how to escape? Management playing with people's lives.
reason: Fire safety violation with locked escape doors, life-threatening negligence.
suggested_rewrite: Locked fire escape doors are a serious safety violation. Report immediately to BOMBA and the local council. This is not just a complaint - it's a legal requirement.

input_text: 学校附近的小贩卖不健康的零食给学生。学校和卫生部门都不管。
reason: Unhealthy food vendors near schools targeting students with no oversight.
suggested_rewrite: 学校周围的食品销售应受到卫生部门的监管。家长可以联合向学校和地方当局反映健康饮食关注。

input_text: Kedai emas ni tipu customer. Stamp 916 tapi kualiti tak sampai pun. Menipu je kerja diorang.
reason: Gold shop fraud accusation about misrepresented gold purity.
suggested_rewrite: Kualiti emas boleh disahkan di makmal bebas. Jika terdapat penipuan, laporkan kepada KPDNHEP dengan bukti ujian makmal.

input_text: இந்த பகுதியில் தடுப்பூசி மையம் எதுவும் இல்லை. அருகிலுள்ள மையம் மிகவும் தொலைவில் உள்ளது.
reason: No nearby vaccination center, healthcare access barrier.
suggested_rewrite: தடுப்பூசி சேவைகள் அனைத்து பகுதிகளிலும் எளிதில் அணுகக்கூடியதாக இருக்க வேண்டும். நடமாடும் தடுப்பூசி பிரிவுகள் இந்த பிரச்சினையை தீர்க்கலாம்.

input_text: Tabung Haji dividends keep going down but management fees stay the same. Where's the money going?
reason: Questioning Tabung Haji declining dividends vs unchanged management fees.
suggested_rewrite: Tabung Haji depositors have the right to transparent reporting on fund performance and management costs. Attend annual meetings for detailed financial updates.

input_text: Nak beli sayur kat pasar pun kena harga tourist sebab muka aku macam foreigner. Memang tak adil.
reason: Price discrimination based on perceived ethnicity at market, racial profiling.
suggested_rewrite: Menetapkan harga berdasarkan penampilan pembeli adalah diskriminasi. Semua pelanggan berhak mendapat harga yang sama. Pedagang harus memaparkan harga tetap.

input_text: 拍卖网站上的二手车都是事故车。卖家从来不说实话。消费者权益在哪里？
reason: Used car fraud concern on auction sites with undisclosed accident history.
suggested_rewrite: 购买二手车前应进行独立验车并检查事故记录。遇到欺诈行为可向消费者法庭投诉。

input_text: Bandar ni dah macam hutan beton. Pokok dah ditebang untuk buat parking. Udara panas, polution meningkat.
reason: Urban deforestation for parking, losing green spaces and worsening air quality.
suggested_rewrite: Penghijauan bandar penting untuk kualiti hidup. Pembangunan harus mengekalkan atau menambah kawasan hijau untuk keseimbangan alam.

input_text: My EPF savings not enough for retirement. Government keep letting us withdraw. Who protects our old age?
reason: EPF withdrawal policy criticism with retirement adequacy concern.
suggested_rewrite: Balancing EPF withdrawals with retirement adequacy is important. Consider supplementary retirement savings and review EPF's long-term financial planning tools.

input_text: Remaja sekarang tak hormat orang tua langsung. Duduk seat prioriti dalam bas pun tak nak bagi. Generasi tanpa adab.
reason: Generational complaint about youth not giving up priority seats, calling them generation without manners.
suggested_rewrite: Pendidikan adab termasuk memberi tempat duduk kepada warga emas adalah tanggungjawab bersama ibu bapa, sekolah, dan masyarakat.

input_text: 公共停车场的停车位太小了。每次开门都会碰到旁边的车。设计的人有没有开过车？
reason: Narrow parking spaces causing door dings, questioning design standards.
suggested_rewrite: 停车位尺寸标准可能需要更新以适应现代车辆。市政厅可以审查公共停车场的设计规范。

input_text: Dental treatment at government clinic limited to extraction only. Want filling also cannot. What kind of dental care is that?
reason: Limited dental services at government clinics frustrating patients wanting preventive care.
suggested_rewrite: Government dental clinics should offer comprehensive services including fillings. Budget allocation for dental care needs to be increased to meet demand.

input_text: Kawasan perumahan baru ni takde sekolah, takde klinik, takde kedai. Developer buat rumah je tapi fasiliti zero.
reason: New housing area without essential amenities, developer shirking community facilities.
suggested_rewrite: Pembangunan perumahan baru perlu menyediakan kemudahan asas. Pembeli boleh semak pelan pembangunan dan menuntut kemudahan yang dijanjikan dalam SPA.

input_text: Septic tank overflow kat rumah sewa tapi landlord tak nak repair. Suruh kita bayar sendiri. Exploit tenant je kerja dia.
reason: Landlord refusing septic tank repair, pushing costs to tenant.
suggested_rewrite: Tanggungjawab penyelenggaraan struktural termasuk tangki septik biasanya terletak pada tuan rumah. Semak perjanjian sewa dan dapatkan nasihat undang-undang jika perlu.

input_text: 这里的公交路线太少了。很多地方根本没有公交车到达。怎么能不依赖私家车？
reason: Limited bus routes forcing car dependency, public transport coverage complaint.
suggested_rewrite: 公交路线的扩展是减少私家车依赖的关键。居民可以通过公众咨询向交通部门建议新增路线。

input_text: கல்லூரி கட்டணம் மிகவும் அதிகம். ஏழை மாணவர்கள் படிக்க முடியாத நிலை.
reason: College fee barrier preventing poor students from accessing higher education.
suggested_rewrite: உயர் கல்வி அனைவருக்கும் அணுகக்கூடியதாக இருக்க வேண்டும். அரசாங்க உதவித்தொகைகள் மற்றும் கடன் திட்டங்கள் மேம்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: Workshop repair kereta ni caj RM500 tapi masalah sama je lepas sehari. Rasa macam kena tipu.
reason: Car workshop charged RM500 but problem persists, feeling scammed.
suggested_rewrite: Jika pembaikan kereta gagal, minta penjelasan dan pembaikan semula secara percuma. Simpan resit dan senarai kerja untuk tuntutan jika perlu.
